scope: C-03 terminal-detection: structured terminal metadata, multiplexer detection, and user-agent token formatting.

requiredBehaviors: TERM_PROGRAM plus TERM_PROGRAM_VERSION takes precedence over later terminal-specific probes
known TERM_PROGRAM values normalize through space, dash, underscore, dot, and case differences
terminal-specific environment variables identify WezTerm, iTerm2, Apple Terminal, kitty, alacritty, konsole, GNOME Terminal, VTE, and Windows Terminal
TERM falls back to dumb, WezTerm, or unknown terminal identity
edgeCases: empty version variables still identify the terminal without a version
kitty TERM detection takes precedence over alacritty socket detection

requiredBehaviors: tmux and zellij environment variables populate structured multiplexer metadata
TERM_PROGRAM=tmux uses tmux client termtype and termname to report the underlying terminal
tmux version comes from TERM_PROGRAM_VERSION only when TERM_PROGRAM is tmux
user-agent token formatting prefers termProgram/version, then TERM, then terminal-name defaults
invalid user-agent header characters are replaced with underscores
edgeCases: tmux client termtype includes a whitespace-separated version
tmux client termtype missing but termname present
TERM_PROGRAM is not tmux but TMUX_PANE still marks the multiplexer
zellij helper returns true only for zellij multiplexers
